code:
type DivError =
  | DivByZero
  | Overflow

fn safe_div(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Result<Int, DivError>
  if b == 0
    Err(DivError.DivByZero)
  else
    Ok(a / b)
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match safe_div(42, 7)
  when Ok(v)
    print("ok=#{v}")
  when Err(DivByZero)
    print("err=DivByZero")
  when Err(Overflow)
    print("err=Overflow")
  end

  match safe_div(10, 0)
  when Ok(v)
    print("ok=#{v}")
  when Err(DivByZero)
    print("err=DivByZero")
  when Err(Overflow)
    print("err=Overflow")
  end
end
